title: Counselling Psychologist
how_to_become: To enter a counselling psychology training programme, you need an accredited undergraduate or postgraduate degree and graduate membership of the BPS, plus experience working with adults or children.
description: Counselling psychologists support people experiencing mental health problems concerning life issues including bereavement, domestic violence, sexual abuse, traumas, and relationship issues. They combine theory and research with therapeutic practice.

entry_requirements.overview: An undergraduate or postgraduate degree accredited by the BPS leading to graduate membership is required, plus experience working with adults or children.
entry_requirements.widening_access: SWAP supports adult learners with few or no qualifications to enter higher education.

work_experience: Work placements and volunteering can provide healthcare experience and help when applying to university, college, or a new job with NHSScotland.

learning_and_development.overview: Personal therapy as a client is required as part of training and continued professional development.

progression_roles: Register of Psychologists Specialising in Psychotherapy

professional_bodies: British Psychological Society (BPS) — graduate and chartered membership
Health and Care Professions Council (HCPC) — mandatory registration

chunks.text: To enter counselling psychology training, you need a BPS-accredited degree leading to graduate membership and experience working with adults or children.

Counselling psychologists support people with mental health problems relating to life issues including bereavement, domestic violence, sexual abuse, traumas, and relationship difficulties, combining theory and research with therapeutic practice.

Counselling psychologists can qualify for the Register of Psychologists Specialising in Psychotherapy, become clinical supervisors, head of a psychology service, consultant psychologist, or move into research and teaching.
Counselling psychologists must be HCPC-registered. They can join the BPS at graduate and chartered membership levels.
